title: iris × germanica subsp. pallida
intro: Iris × germanica subsp. pallida, also known as the pale yellow iris or English iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant belonging to the iris family (Iridaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Iris × germanica subsp. pallida include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and skin irritations. Iris × germanica subsp. pallida can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
